# Desktop Defense

Desktop Defense is a high-octane tower defense game playable in your browser. 
Protect your core from waves of enemies using strategic tower placement and upgrades.

## Game Features
- Multiple tactical tower types (Pellet, Splash, Slow, Sniper, Chain, Mortar)
- Diverse themes and aesthetics
- Challenging wave-based gameplay
- High score tracking
- Fully responsive design

## Play Online
https://ais-dev-iy5apwfatxb2xsu3an4ttt-249890604195.europe-west1.run.app
